steps.title: Use the past-time signal
steps.content: The phrase nearly 150 years ago places Van Gogh's action at a specific completed time in the past. The verb must therefore be simple past, not present, future, or ongoing.

steps.title: Reject incompatible tenses
steps.content: Choice A is present perfect progressive and cannot fit a specific ago phrase. Choice B describes an action happening now. Choice C describes a future action. The simple past form fits the completed historical event. The answer is D.
